title: RNA velocity analysis of FACS-sorted endothelial cells from brain tumors
author: Ghobrial, Moheb
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: RNA velocity objects (zip files of .h5ad) of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells of overall merge of brain tumors: -> part of the manuscript: Single-cell atlas of the human brain vasculature across development, adulthood and disease https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-024-07493-y -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- - Overall merge of tumor sorted endothelial cells_RNA velocity.zip: -> this is a zip file of an RNA velocity object (.h5ad) of the overall merge of FACS-sorted (CD31+/CD45-) endothelial cells isolated from brain tumors (lower-grade glioma, high-grade glioma (glioblastoma), brain metastasis, meningiomas).
